title: The Rei song
wikitext:
[]: The Rei song.             Quote Post by Man Chong » Sun Aug 08, 2004 9:51 pm Yea, this is what I personally call the "Rei song." It's Zankoku na Tenshi no Teeze, sung by Rei. It's really REALLY great. I kinda at first assumed everyone here already listened to it...But finding several fellow Rei Fanatics who haven't... I have decided to share this spectacular piece of music to you all! http://purlace.net/eva/data/ayanami-01.zip COME AND LISTEN! Or else! Every Rei fanatic should hear this. Haha

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sun Aug 08, 2004 9:52 pm Being the massive EVA Geek I am, I already have it..... and yes it is one of the better versions of the song, though I prefer the Punk Version.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun Aug 08, 2004 10:02 pm *grumbles* Making fun of me for not having heard it before... .. ... It is great though!

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Mon Aug 09, 2004 7:52 am Good song... ...but like Eva-01X, I've already heard it, and prefer the punk version. Rock Me Amedeus!!!

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Aug 09, 2004 2:25 pm nice song... eh kiel, where does that quote in your sig come from?

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Mon Aug 09, 2004 3:14 pm I haven't heard the punk version. Anyone have a link?

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Mon Aug 09, 2004 3:38 pm Tell me how to post a song on the site and I'll let you all listion.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaPimp » Mon Aug 09, 2004 8:28 pm coff wrote: I haven't heard the punk version. Anyone have a link?

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sat Aug 21, 2004 7:28 pm i don't think i have heard the eva theme sung by Rei i have Fly me to the moon sung by her but thats about it

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Aug 21, 2004 9:43 pm Man, its been awhile since I downloaded this song. Good thing you brought it up, it was a refreshing to hear it after so long.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sun Aug 22, 2004 10:37 am ChronoX wrote: i don't think i have heard the eva theme sung by Rei i have Fly me to the moon sung by her but thats about it
